command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- ── Step 1: Insert customer records ─────────────────────────────────────────
INSERT INTO customers (externalId, name, billingPlatforms, serviceCount, monthlyCost, unmatchedCount, matchedCount, status, notes)
VALUES
  ('cust-action-smart-group', 'Action Smart Group', 'CommsCode', 0, 0.00, 0, 0, 'active', 'Customer created from CommsCode Number Manager portal. Holds 10 inbound 1300/1800 numbers. No DataGate or Xero record found at time of creation.'),
  ('cust-envest', 'Envest', 'CommsCode', 0, 0.00, 0, 0, 'active', 'Customer created from CommsCode Number Manager portal. Holds 1 inbound 1300 number (Envest Routing). No DataGate or Xero record found at time of creation.');

-- ── Step 2: Insert placeholder CommsCode voice service for Action Smart Group ─
INSERT INTO services (externalId, serviceId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, status, supplierName, supplierAccount, customerName, customerExternalId, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, dataSource)
VALUES
  ('svc-asg-commsCode-voice', 'commsCode-29785', 'Voice', 'Inbound 1300/1800', 'CommsCode Inbound Voice', 'active', 'CommsCode', '29785', 'Action Smart Group', 'cust-action-smart-group', 0.00, 0.00, 'commsCode');

-- ── Step 3: Insert placeholder CommsCode voice service for Envest ─────────────
INSERT INTO services (externalId, serviceId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, status, supplierName, supplierAccount, customerName, customerExternalId, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, dataSource)
VALUES
  ('svc-envest-commsCode-voice', 'commsCode-30271', 'Voice', 'Inbound 1300', 'CommsCode Inbound Voice', 'active', 'CommsCode', '30271', 'Envest', 'cust-envest', 0.00, 0.00, 'commsCode');

-- ── Step 4: Update customer service counts ────────────────────────────────────
UPDATE customers SET serviceCount = 1 WHERE externalId = 'cust-action-smart-group';
UPDATE customers SET serviceCount = 1 WHERE externalId = 'cust-envest';
